info.title: Snitcher API
info.description: Discovering leads or discovering our API. This page is all you need to do both!

parameters.name: domain

parameters.description: Either organisation_uuid or domain must be provided

parameters.description: The number of organisations per page (1-1000)

message.example: The domain or organisation_uuid must be provided

put.summary: Reveal an email for an organisation contact

parameters.name: segmentUuid
parameters.description: Optional segment UUID for filtering organisations

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of organisations per page (1-1000)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The specific date to filter organisations that visited that day.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: The start date for filtering organisations based on visits. Can only be used if `date` is not provided.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: The end date for filtering organisations based on visits. Can only be used if `date` is not provided.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filters organisations where the name contains the given string.

parameters.description: Optional segment UUID for filtering organisations

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of organisations per page (1-1000)

delete.summary: Remove a tag from an organisation

204.description: The tag was removed from the organisation

parameters.description: Only include sessions matching this segment UUID

parameters.description: The specific date to filter sessions. Cannot be used together with date_from/date_to.

parameters.description: Filter sessions where the visited URL contains the given string.

browser.description: The browser used during the session

device_type.description: The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet)

value.description: The value(s) for the comparison. Not required for `set` and `not_set`.

unit.description: The date unit to use in case of a relative comparison

operator.description: The logical operator for the group. 'AND' means all conditions must match, 'OR' means at least one condition must match.

conditions.description: A list of filter conditions or nested filter groups.
